name: @scope/root
description: Template for SolidJS monorepo using tsup for bundling. Configured with Bun, TypeScript, ESLint, Oxfmt, Vitest, and GHA
author: Daniel Sanchez <dsanc89@icloud.com>

scripts.jsr:version: bun -e "import {readFileSync,writeFileSync,readdirSync,existsSync} from 'fs'; import {join} from 'path'; const failed=[]; for(const dir of readdirSync('packages')){if(existsSync(join('packages',dir,'jsr.json'))){try{const jsrPath=join('packages',dir,'jsr.json');const pkgPath=join('packages',dir,'package.json');const jsr=JSON.parse(readFileSync(jsrPath,'utf8'));jsr.version=JSON.parse(readFileSync(pkgPath,'utf8')).version;writeFileSync(jsrPath,JSON.stringify(jsr,null,2)+'\n');}catch{failed.push(dir);}}} if(failed.length){console.error('jsr:version failed for:',failed.join(', ')); process.exit(1);}"
scripts.jsr:publish: bun -e "import {readdirSync,existsSync} from 'fs'; import {join} from 'path'; import {execSync} from 'child_process'; const failed=[]; for(const dir of readdirSync('packages')){if(existsSync(join('packages',dir,'jsr.json'))){try{execSync('jsr publish',{cwd:join('packages',dir),stdio:'inherit'});}catch{failed.push(dir);}}} if(failed.length){console.error('jsr publish failed for:',failed.join(', ')); process.exit(1);}"
scripts.pkg:publish: bun run build:pkg && changeset publish && bun run jsr:publish
